prompt: Create a hyper-realistic high-fashion editorial photograph in a vertical 4:5 frame set inside a grand surreal white marble gallery. The scene features a luxurious neoclassical interior with polished marble floors, tall cream-white arches, carved columns, soft daylight, subtle statues in the background, and warm cinematic shadows. In the lower left foreground, place one seated Hollywood-style male fashion model with curly dark hair, a thick beard, and a strong masculine presence, wearing a sharp black suit, open-collar white dress shirt, black trousers, and glossy black leather dress shoes; he sits casually on a low white marble plinth with one hand braced behind him and one leg bent, looking upward into the surreal installation. Around him, suspend exactly five large circular white marble portal frames like floating mirrors/windows, each with thick beveled stone rims and dark reflective interiors, showing close-up alternate versions of the same bearded male model with different poses and emotions: 1) upper left portal, small, the man leans forward with one hand near his face; 2) center portal, largest, dramatic close-up of curly hair, beard, and hand near chin; 3) upper right portal, partial close-up in profile wearing a dark suit; 4) lower left portal, smaller close-up with serious shadowed expression; 5) right side portal, large close-up cropped at the cheek and collarbone with intense moody lighting. Make the portals overlap the architecture and each other with believable depth, reflections, and occlusion, as if revealing parallel cinematic portraits. Visual style: hyper-realistic, luxury fashion campaign, masculine cinematic beauty, controlled surreal chaos, marble texture detail, shallow depth of field in the portraits, warm beige and ivory palette, black suit contrast, natural museum-gallery lighting, elegant editorial composition. Use no text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, and keep the model’s face visible rather than covered. Optional customization: model identity can be described as an unnamed Hollywood-style bearded male model, outfit as black suit with an open-collar white dress shirt, setting as white marble, mood as surreal masculine cinematic perfection, and number of portals as five.
